prompt: /tdd implement a REST API with: (1) GET /users endpoint, (2) POST /users endpoint, (3) GET /users/:id endpoint, (4) DELETE /users/:id endpoint. All endpoints are independent — no dependencies between them.

assertions.text: Decomposes into 4 work units with no dependencies between them
Computes a single parallel batch containing all 4 units
Presents the execution plan showing all units run concurrently in Batch 1
Dispatches multiple Test Writers simultaneously (up to maxParallelPairs config, default 3)
Each unit independently goes through the full RED→GREEN→review cycle
Applies the three-stage review pipeline: spec compliance → adversarial → code quality
Runs a final integration test after all units complete
